login.headline: Your stream. Your tools. Your rules.
login.lede: Private, encrypted, always on. Run your bot and your commands from one calm console.
login.noticeSignedout: You were signed out. That account no longer exists on ItsBagelBot.
login.noticeBanned: This account can no longer use the console.
login.noticeLink: That share link is no longer valid. Ask the broadcaster for a new one.
login.noticeRetry: Sign-in did not finish on our side. Nothing was saved. Please try again.
login.noticeImpersonation: That view-as link is invalid or has already been used. Mint a new one from the admin console.
login.consent: I agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy

goodbye.title: Goodbye
goodbye.lede: Your account, commands, and links have been removed. Thanks for being part of the bakery. The door's always open if you come back.

overview.statusPausedDetail: Your bot is switched off. Turn it back on to rejoin chat.
overview.statusDelegateDetail: You have view-only access. Only the account owner can change the connection.
overview.issueAllDisabled: All your commands are switched off, so the bot stays silent.
overview.setupConnect: Connect the bot to your channel
overview.description: Manage your bot connection and commands from here.
overview.issueReauth: Twitch revoked the bot’s access to your channel. This happens after a password change or if the app was disconnected on Twitch. Reconnect your Twitch account to bring the bot back.
overview.actionFailed: That didn't go through. Try again.
overview.commandsUnavailableDesc: The service is unreachable right now.
overview.subFixPre: The bot lost its chat connection. Fix it in
overview.issueNoAuth: The bot has no Twitch authorization for your channel.
overview.issueIdle: The bot is connected but not replying in chat.
overview.issueSubs: The bot lost its chat connection, so viewers might not get replies.
overview.issueNoCommands: You have no commands yet. The bot has nothing to say.
overview.allGood: Everything's running. Nothing needs you right now.
overview.addAnotherDesc: Create, edit, and tune cooldowns for your channel responses.
overview.createFirstCommandDesc: Custom responses your viewers trigger with !name in chat.
overview.checkAccessDesc: Reconnect Twitch or manage shared dashboard links.
overview.modalRestartBody: This closes the bot's chat connection and opens it again right away.
overview.modalDisconnectBody: This takes your bot out of chat and closes its connection.

settings.leaveBody: You will lose access to this dashboard. The owner will need to share it with you again if you want to return.
settings.description: Manage your connection, account, and who can reach parts of your dashboard.
settings.languageHint: Choose the language for your console. It is saved to your account.
settings.customCursorHint: Show the animated cursor across the console. Turn it off for the normal pointer. Saved to your account.
settings.cursorSaveError: Couldn't save your cursor preference. Try again in a moment.
settings.reconnectTwitchHint: Re-run Twitch authorization to refresh the bot's access to your channel.
settings.deleteAccountHint: Permanently remove your account and all of your configurations.
settings.accessGrantedHint: Generate a link to give someone scoped access to your dashboard. The first person to accept it is bound to that access permanently. Revoke it here any time.
settings.noShareLinksBody: Create one below to let a mod manage parts of your dashboard.
settings.newShareLinkHint: Pick which sections the invitee can manage.
settings.notificationsEmpty: Nothing yet. Messages from the ItsBagelBot team will show up here.
settings.nothingSharedBody: When a broadcaster shares their dashboard, it appears here.
settings.revokeBodyConsumed: {login} immediately loses access to your dashboard. This cannot be undone.
settings.revokeBodyPending: The link stops working immediately. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteBody: This removes your account, commands, and any links you created. It cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAck: I recognize that this action is irreversible and will lose all my configurations
settings.toastClipboardBlocked: Clipboard blocked. Select the link manually.
settings.toastCreated: Share link created. Copy it below.

billing.cancelConfirmBody: Your Premium stays active until {date}. After that it will not renew and you return to the free plan.
billing.cancelConfirmBodyNoDate: Your Premium will not renew. You return to the free plan at the end of the current period.
billing.giftNeedRecipient: Enter a Twitch username to send a gift.
billing.descManage: Manage your plan and status. Tebex handles payment and subscription changes.
billing.descChoose: Choose a plan. Tebex handles secure payment; nothing is stored in our frame.
billing.degraded: Billing data is temporarily unavailable. What you see may be incomplete. Try again shortly.
billing.freeDesc: Not a trial. The entire toolkit, because the best moderation shouldn't depend on your budget.
billing.premiumDesc: Keeps the servers warm and bumps you to the front of the queue when chat gets loud.
billing.premiumFeat2: Your messages jump to the front of the line
billing.premiumFine: Monthly renews automatically until cancelled. One month is a single charge, no renewal.
billing.oath: no card on file · cancel in one click · redirects to Tebex's secure hosted checkout
billing.vipHint: VIP is permanent. It never expires and there is nothing to pay.
billing.staffGrantHint: Premium granted by the ItsBagelBot team{until}. Nothing to pay and nothing will be charged while the grant is active.
billing.tebexHint: {state}{until}. Use Tebex-hosted subscription management to review payments or change the subscription.
billing.manageTiny: Both redirect to Tebex-hosted subscription management, where cancellation is one click.
billing.giftCtaHint: Pay for another streamer's premium. They need an ItsBagelBot account, and they get notified the moment your payment lands.
billing.giftModalBody: Pay for another streamer's month of Premium. They need an ItsBagelBot account, and get a notification (and an email, if we have one) the moment your payment lands.
billing.messagePlaceholder: Say something nice. It rides along in their gift email.
billing.giftNoteLink: Gift notes can't contain links or web addresses. Please remove it and try again.
billing.giftSentNamedPost: know. Their month of Premium is activating now.
billing.giftSentBody: Their month of Premium is activating now, and we've let them know.
billing.premiumActivatedBody: Your support keeps ItsBagelBot running. The priority lane and every premium perk are unlocked now.
billing.paymentSlowBody: Tebex confirmed the payment, but activation is taking longer than usual. Give it a minute and refresh. If it still shows Free, contact us.
billing.paymentReceivedBody: Thank you! We're activating your Premium. This updates on its own, usually within a minute.
billing.toastCheckoutCancelled: Checkout cancelled. No charge was made.

commands.description: Custom responses your viewers can trigger in chat. {active} active, {disabled} disabled.
commands.degraded: Live command data is unreachable right now. Showing nothing rather than stale rows. Retry shortly.
commands.noneYetSub: Create your first custom response. Viewers trigger it with
commands.inspectorIdle: Select a command to edit it here, or start a new one.
commands.errBuiltinName: That name belongs to a built-in command. Pick another.
commands.composeReplace: You already have !{name}. Creating this will replace its response and settings.
commands.toastCouldNotRestore: Could not restore !{name}. Recreate it manually.
commands.discardBody: You have unsaved changes to this command. Discard them?

channelpoints.description: Create the rewards viewers redeem with channel points, and choose what the bot says when they do.
channelpoints.degraded: Channel points are temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
channelpoints.reconnect: Reconnect your Twitch account to manage channel points — one extra permission is needed.
channelpoints.botOnHint: Master switch: the bot only reacts to redemptions while this is on.
channelpoints.inspectorIdle: Select a reward to edit it here, or create a new one.
channelpoints.emptySub: Create your first reward — it appears in your Twitch channel’s points menu right away.
channelpoints.fieldPromptPh: Shown under the reward on Twitch
channelpoints.requireInput: Ask the viewer to type a message with the redeem
channelpoints.queueHint: What happens to each redeem in your Twitch requests queue.
channelpoints.limitPerStreamHint: Set to 1 to make it claimable once per stream.
channelpoints.fieldCounterHint: Each redemption adds 1 to this counter (create it on the Counters page).
channelpoints.fieldCounterScopeHint: Only used when creating the counter here. Reward title separates each reward’s per-user tally.
channelpoints.fieldPointsHint: Points the redeemer earns per redemption. 0 awards nothing.
channelpoints.deleteBody: “{name}” is removed from Twitch and the bot stops reacting to it. This cannot be undone.
channelpoints.discardBody: You have unsaved changes to this reward. Discard them?

loyalty.topCaption: Top viewers ranked by loyalty points
loyalty.description: Your channel’s own currency: viewers earn it by subscribing, cheering, and watching.
loyalty.degraded: Loyalty settings are temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
loyalty.botOnHint: Master switch: nobody earns points while this is off.
loyalty.ratesHint: Leave a field at 0 to use the default shown next to it. Set it to -1 to turn that source off.
loyalty.tierHint: Sub and resub awards scale with the tier: ×1, ×2 (tier 2), ×6 (tier 3).
loyalty.topEmpty: No standings yet — they appear once viewers start earning.
loyalty.chatPoints: Viewers check their balance and watch time.
loyalty.chatPointsMod: Mods set or grant points to a viewer.
loyalty.chatCounter: Mods manage counters (also on the Counters page).

rewardCounter.nameHint: Type a new name to create it here, or an existing counter to add to it.
rewardCounter.scopeViewerRewardDesc: Each viewer gets their own tally for this reward. Best for most rewards.
rewardCounter.scopeRewardDesc: Everyone adds to one shared total for this reward. Best for community goals.
rewardCounter.scopeViewerDesc: Each viewer gets one tally, shared across every reward that uses this counter.
rewardCounter.scopeChannelDesc: One running total for the whole channel.
rewardCounter.tokenNote: Use {counter} in the chat reply to show the new total.
rewardCounter.pointsHint: Use {points} in the chat reply to show the amount.
rewardCounter.liveOnlyHint: Offline redeems still reply in chat, but don’t count or grant points.

counters.errName: Enter a name for this counter.
counters.resetBody: This clears every stored value for "{name}". Commands that bump it start again from zero.
counters.description: Named tallies your commands and channel-point rewards bump: deaths, wins, hugs, anything.
counters.degraded: Counters are temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
counters.scopeCommand: Per command or reward, all users pooled
counters.scopeViewerCommand: Per user, per command or reward
counters.scopeHint: Bump it from a command response with {counter:name}, from a reward on the Channel Points page, or with !counter add.
counters.scopeLocked: The scope is fixed once created. To change it, delete the counter and recreate it.
counters.emptySub: Create one above, or just use {counter:name} in a command response. It appears here on first use.
counters.pickerEmpty: No counters yet. Create one below.
counters.deleteBody: “{name}” and all its stored values are removed. Commands that bump it will recreate it from zero. This cannot be undone.
counters.entriesEmpty: Nothing recorded yet for this counter.
counters.errUnknownUser: No Twitch user with that name.

timers.errMessage: Enter a message for this timer.
timers.errInterval: Enter a whole number of minutes between 1 and 1440.
timers.description: Messages the bot repeats on a schedule while you’re live — announcements, socials, reminders.
timers.degraded: Timers are temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
timers.botOnHint: Master switch: timers only run while this is on, and only while you’re live.
timers.inspectorIdle: Select a timer to edit it here, or create a new one.
timers.emptySub: Create one — it starts repeating the moment your stream goes live.
timers.deleteBody: This timer stops repeating immediately. This cannot be undone.
timers.discardBody: You have unsaved changes to this timer. Discard them?

quotes.deleteBodyNamed: Delete quote "{snippet}"? Its number is retired and never reused.
quotes.description: The channel quote book: memorable lines saved from chat, replayed with !quote.
quotes.degraded: Quotes are temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
quotes.botOnHint: Master switch: !quote only works in chat while this is on.
quotes.permsHint: Who may save a new quote or rewrite an existing one from chat. Removing is always moderator-only.
quotes.inspectorIdle: Select a quote to inspect it, or add a new one.
quotes.fieldDayHint: Choose the day the quote was said.
quotes.emptySub: Add one here, or save from chat with !addquote the text.
quotes.deleteBody: This removes the quote for good. Its number is retired and never reused.

modules.disabledNote: This module is off. The settings and replies below stay editable and take effect as soon as you turn it on.
modules.triggerRulesHint: Reply when a message matches a phrase, no "!" needed. First match wins.
modules.noTriggersBody: Add a rule to reply automatically when a word shows up in chat.
modules.description: Optional features for your channel. {active} of {total} enabled.
modules.degraded: Module settings are temporarily unavailable. Showing defaults.
modules.inspectorIdle: Select a module to configure it here.
modules.commandsHint: Turn the module on to unlock these chat commands.
modules.replyIdle: Select a message to edit it here.
modules.replyBlankHint: Leave blank to use the default message.
modules.enabledHelp: Turn this module on or off for your channel.
modules.patchConflict: Someone else changed this module. Reloaded the latest — redo your change.
modules.offConfigurable: This module is off. You can configure it now; changes take effect when you enable it.
modules.triggerReserved: That phrase uses reserved syntax (=>, a leading #, or a mode: prefix). Please rephrase it.
modules.tzSuggested: Your browser reports {tz}. Detected on your device only — nothing is stored unless you apply it.
modules.discardBody: You have unsaved changes here. Discard them?

onboarding.title: Welcome aboard 🥯
onboarding.intro: You're connected. The bot can see your chat. Two minutes of setup and it's fully live:
onboarding.consentBody: Please accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy before proceeding.
onboarding.consentLabel: I agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy
onboarding.langBody: Pick the language for your console. You can change it later in Settings.
onboarding.step1Body: Type this in your Twitch chat. Without mod status, Twitch silences the bot in follower-only, sub-only, and slow-mode chats. It would look like it just stopped working.
onboarding.step2Body: Head to Commands and build a !command. The live chat rehearsal shows exactly what the bot will say before you save.
onboarding.step3Body: Optional extras like Auto Shoutout for incoming raids. One toggle each, configured in a minute.

commandEditor.name: Name
commandEditor.renameHint: The trigger viewers type in chat. Renaming keeps the response and settings.
commandEditor.responsePlaceholder: What the bot replies… insert variables below.
commandEditor.linesHint: Up to {max} lines — each line is sent as its own chat message.
commandEditor.tokTarget: first argument, e.g. a mentioned user
commandEditor.tokChannel: the channel the command runs in
commandEditor.tokCounter: bumps the named counter and shows its new value
commandEditor.tokRandom: a random number from 1 to 100, or {random:min-max}
commandEditor.tokChoice: picks one of the comma-separated options at random
commandEditor.restrictPlaceholder: Twitch user ID. Only they can run it

chatPreview.runsVerb: This response runs the Twitch {verb} command
chatPreview.nothingToSay: …the bot has nothing to say yet

commandRow.unsavedTitle: You have unsaved edits for this command
commandRow.builtinTitle: Built-in command: toggle only, no editable response

builtinInspector.enabledHelp: Turn this built-in command on or off for your channel.
builtinInspector.replyHint: Leave blank for the default. {clip} = the clip link, {user} = the clipper, {target} = the title.

govee.description: Bind a channel-points reward to each Govee light. Viewers redeem, type a colour (or "off"), and the bot drives that light. One reward per light.
govee.degraded: Could not reach the backend. Try again in a moment.
govee.keyHelpPre: Get a key from the Govee mobile app:
govee.keyPath: Profile → Settings → Apply for API Key
govee.keyHelpPost: It is stored encrypted. We never show it back.
govee.devicesError: Could not load your Govee lights. Check your API key and try again.
govee.noLights: No colour-capable Govee lights found on this account.
govee.deleteBody: This removes the Twitch reward for {name} and unbinds the light. Deleting a Twitch reward cannot be undone.
govee.editorHintNames: Viewers type a colour when they redeem: a name like
govee.allowOffLabel: Let viewers turn the light off
govee.allowOffHint: A viewer can type off to turn this light off.
govee.liveOnlyOn: Redemptions only work while your stream is live (recommended).
govee.liveOnlyOff: Off: viewers can change this light even when you are offline.

ios.title: Add to Home Screen
ios.step1: Tap the Share button in the toolbar.
